response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI production experience is less explicitly detailed than required, his technical leadership, cloud-relevant projects (e.g., Kubernetes, AWS), and open-source contributions suggest adaptability. The role's staff-level expectations may stretch his current profile, but his problem-solving and mentorship history warrant an interview.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes), aligning with key job requirements.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) and developer tooling at re:cinq.
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including workshops, open-source projects, and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI solution development (focus is broader: full-stack, embedded, and data systems).
No direct mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization in resume highlights.
Staff-level roles typically require deeper specialization in AI/cloud; current experience skews toward generalist engineering.
